description.en: (default: 1) How many arguments of type type should be consumed when this option is seen. If > 1, optparse will store a tuple of values to dest.

excerpt.es: (default: 1) How many arguments of type type should be consumed when this option is seen. If > 1, optparse will store a tuple of values to dest.
excerpt.en: (default: 1) How many arguments of type type should be consumed when this option is seen. If > 1, optparse will store a tuple of values to dest.
